faqs.question: Why are crickets so common in Corona, Queens?
faqs.answer: Corona's proximity to Flushing Meadows-Corona Park and other green spaces provides ideal cricket habitats. As temperatures drop or during dry spells, crickets migrate into homes and businesses seeking moisture, warmth, and food. The neighborhood's dense mix of older and newer buildings offers many entry points for these pests.
